spotlight.title: The Legacy of Imam Hussain & The Day of Ashura
spotlight.description: A brothers-only gathering at Ghousia Masjid with Mawlana Irfan Naqshbandi and Mawlana Faizan Raza. Langar e Hussaini will be served.
spotlight.location: GMT Ghousia Masjid, 56 Camrose Street, SE2 0JA

notificationBar.linkText: The Legacy of Imam Hussain & The Day of Ashura — Friday 26th June, 8pm to Maghrib Salah
